strengths: Exceeds the 15-year minimum requirement in software engineering with hands-on builder fluency across diverse stacks and cloud technologies.
Strong entrepreneurial background demonstrated by founding GISCollective and developing open-source platforms within larger tech ecosystems.
Proven ability to inspire internal and external technical communities through public talks (FOSS4G), workshops, and organizing Refactoring Dojos.
concerns: Lacks recognized, deep expertise in AI/ML; AI experience is limited to recent contributions to MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq.
No evidence of Director-level strategic leadership or experience advising strategic enterprise customers on cutting-edge AI adoption.
Does not hold the preferred Master's or PhD degree in an AI-related field.
response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum 15 years of software engineering experience and demonstrates strong entrepreneurial traits as the founder of GISCollective. He also fulfills the requirement to inspire others externally, evidenced by his FOSS4G talks and Selenium workshops. However, this is a Director-level AI Strategy role requiring deep, recognized AI expertise to advise strategic customers. Bogdan's AI background is limited to recent tooling work at re:cinq (MCP, agentic workflows), and he lacks both the preferred advanced AI degree and the executive-level strategic advisory experience required to drive enterprise AI differentiation. Because the core competency of the role is AI Strategy, he is not a strong fit.
